use std::sync::Arc;

struct SharedState {
    config: Arc<Config>,
    metrics: Arc<Metrics>,
}

fn process_batch(items: &[Item], state: &SharedState) {
    for item in items {
        let cfg = Arc::clone(&state.config);
        let m = Arc::clone(&state.metrics);
        for sub in &item.children {
            let cfg2 = Arc::clone(&cfg);
            let m2 = Arc::clone(&m);
            let _ = process_one(sub, &cfg2, &m2);
        }
    }
}

fn process_one(_item: &Item, _cfg: &Config, _m: &Metrics) -> Result<(), ()> {
    Ok(())
}

struct Config;
struct Metrics;
struct Item {
    children: Vec<SubItem>,
}
struct SubItem;
